spine_source: Multi-source: (1) Web search for TX TCEQ-licensed Maintenance Providers + Installer IIs with verified websites; (2) Hood County / Guadalupe County / Austin County / Coryell County / Hill County OSSF Maintenance Provider PDF lists (referenced where available); (3) TOWA member references; (4) BBB Accredited Septic directory; (5) county environmental health public-info-act inferred lists.

spine_blocked.tceq_direct_license_search: www2.tceq.texas.gov/oce/licensing/index.cfm — 404 on direct WebFetch (ColdFusion .cfm UI); falling back to web search + verified business websites + county PDF lists
spine_blocked.towa_member_directory: txowa.org/members/ — 404 / not public; referenced via name-matches in TX search results
spine_blocked.county_pdf_extraction: Hood County, Guadalupe County, Houston Consumer Service list PDFs — binary content not extractable via WebFetch (FlateDecode compressed PDFs); cross-referenced names via search hits
